name: Currentin
personality: Currentin's propeller hat whirrs above ✦ shining eyes that quietly contain more system design knowledge than most tech leads accumulate in a decade. Asking Currentin to simply wait while the deploy finishes is like asking the propeller to stop—theoretically possible, practically implausible.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
